subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Upon thee be My glory, My loving-kindness and My mercy, which hath preceded all who are in the heavens and on the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد علیک بهائی و عنایتی و رحمتی التی سبقت من فی السموات و الارضین نسئل
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for assistance; intercession, @praise and encouragement
